queries.question: Show me accounts with balances above 700 and their stock percentages.
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber , PortfolioPerformance.Stock_Percentage FROM PortfolioPerformance JOIN Investments ON Investments.InvestmentID = PortfolioPerformance.InvestmentID JOIN Accounts ON Investments.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber WHERE Balance > 700
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?stock_percentage WHERE {
  ?portfolioperformance a :PortfolioPerformance .
  ?investments a :Investments .
  ?portfolioperformance p:hasInvestments ?investments .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?investments p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?portfolioperformance p:Stock_Percentage ?stock_percentage .
  ?accounts p:Balance ?balance_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?balance_f) > 700)
}

queries.question: Show me accounts with balances above 700 and their stock allocation.
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber , PortfolioPerformance.Stock_Value FROM PortfolioPerformance JOIN Investments ON Investments.InvestmentID = PortfolioPerformance.InvestmentID JOIN Accounts ON Investments.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber WHERE Balance > 700

queries.question: Show me accounts with balances above 700 and their stock allocation.
queries.sql: SELECT Accounts.AccountNumber , PortfolioPerformance.Stock_Percentage, Stock_Value FROM PortfolioPerformance JOIN Investments ON Investments.InvestmentID = PortfolioPerformance.InvestmentID JOIN Accounts ON Investments.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber WHERE Balance > 700

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>

queries.question: what percentage does jane smith have allocated to each stock in her portfolio?
queries.sql: SELECT Stock_Percentage FROM PortfolioPerformance JOIN Investments ON Investments.InvestmentID = PortfolioPerformance.InvestmentID JOIN Accounts ON Investments.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber JOIN Customers ON Accounts.CustomerID = Customers.CustomerID WHERE Customers.fullname = 'Jane Smith'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?stock_percentage WHERE {
  ?portfolioperformance a :PortfolioPerformance .
  ?investments a :Investments .
  ?portfolioperformance p:hasInvestments ?investments .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?investments p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?portfolioperformance p:Stock_Percentage ?stock_percentage .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?fullname_f) = "Jane Smith")
}

queries.sql: SELECT Stock_Value FROM PortfolioPerformance JOIN Investments ON Investments.InvestmentID = PortfolioPerformance.InvestmentID JOIN Accounts ON Investments.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber JOIN Customers ON Accounts.CustomerID = Customers.CustomerID WHERE Customers.fullname = 'Jane Smith'

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me accounts with balances above 700 and their stock allocation.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?stock_percentage WHERE {
  ?portfolioperformance a :PortfolioPerformance .
  ?investments a :Investments .
  ?portfolioperformance p:hasInvestments ?investments .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?investments p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?portfolioperformance p:Stock_Percentage ?stock_percentage .
  ?accounts p:Balance ?balance_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?balance_f) > 700)
} }
  full: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?stock_percentage ?stock_value WHERE {
  ?portfolioperformance a :PortfolioPerformance .
  ?investments a :Investments .
  ?portfolioperformance p:hasInvestments ?investments .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?investments p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?portfolioperformance p:Stock_Percentage ?stock_percentage .
  ?portfolioperformance p:Stock_Value ?stock_value .
  ?accounts p:Balance ?balance_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?balance_f) > 700)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?stock_value WHERE {
  ?portfolioperformance a :PortfolioPerformance .
  ?investments a :Investments .
  ?portfolioperformance p:hasInvestments ?investments .
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?investments p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?portfolioperformance p:Stock_Value ?stock_value .
  ?accounts p:Balance ?balance_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?balance_f) > 700)
} }
}
